content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be reconfigured to hierarchically store curiosity-driven intrinsic rewards from ICM (Intrinsic Curiosity Module) and RND (Random Network Distillation) methods, where unassigned prediction error from curious exploration automatically prioritizes which new experiences are encoded into long-term agent memory rather than relying on pre-specified task labels. This replaces the common active learning paradigm of manually labeling high-uncertainty data with uncertainty-driven, self-supervised memory curation born directly from the agent's own exploratory behavior.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
